representative_quotes: Yep, it’s interesting to witness retail capitulation... Conviction shouldn’t be tied to the quote of a stock on a certain day, but long term revenue or operating income growth.
I personally think $SIVE can be the next $LITE... I'm personally holding long term, since I haven't seen a ~$1.4B company mapping to this many hyperscalers before.
I'm bearish on humans. Hard to see people still having a job if humanoids come out at <$15K mass production.

representative_quotes: Lockheed Martin, $LMT, which donated $1 million to Trump's inauguration and over $10 million to his ballroom project, is reportedly donating $5 million to build the White House helipad... the company has received over $40 billion in in new and expanded government contracts.
Bryan Catanzaro, Nvidia’s vice president of applied deep learning, said the cost of compute for his team now far exceeds what the company spends on the employees using it
Bernstein has said that its 2026 gold forecast is $4375.
